description.ko: 빛나는 이진 코드 형태의 디지털 꽃가루를 방출하여 자연과 데이터 사이의 간극을 메우는 사이버 유기체 꽃입니다.
description.en: A cyber-organic flower releasing digital pollen in the form of glowing binary code, bridging the gap between nature and data.

prompt: A hyper-realistic cinematic 3D render of FLORA-9, titled 'The Data Pollination.' A macro shot of a cybernetic flower with #FFB6C1 pale pink translucent petals etched with #50C878 emerald micro-circuitry. From the stamen, thousands of #89CFF0 cyan glowing binary particles drift into the air like digital pollen. The flower is rooted in #4A0E4E deep plum data-soil with visible fiber-optic roots pulsing with light. Shimmering bokeh effect on the floating data bits. Unreal Engine 5 style, bioluminescent glow, 8k resolution, merging botanical beauty with advanced hardware architecture.
